files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 9d6bde7..7584f6f 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -2,40 +2,40 @@
 
 ## Critical mechanics / API lessons
-- Installed CLI uses `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; rationale string replaces standalone `log_rationale`. Do **not** call separate `nm.analytics.log_rationale` or double-log.
+- Installed CLI is `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; rationale string is the weekly log. Do **not** call separate `nm.analytics.log_rationale` or double-log.
 - Active individual subs use `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`; enterprise leads use `subscriptions.status='lead'` and `customers.customer_type='large'`.
-- Enterprise required replies: latest open `enterprise_turns.closed=0` where latest sender in ('system','customer') and `s.status='lead'`. Query result cap is 5k, so page with `LIMIT 1000`; alias columns (e.g. `latest.seat_count AS seats`). Latest-agent lead threads can remain open; optional refresh only if needed.
-- Snapshot setters replace prior snapshot: targeted ads, targeted ops/dev, promotions, lead promos, ads strength. `analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend` accepts `targeted_spend={group: $/day}`. Keep in-app ads strength at 0.
-- Enterprise offers must cover compute under current tiers. After Day203 A2/B3/C5 monthly compute/seat approx `usage*30*(A .002, B .006, C .03)`. Current offers are positive-margin by estimates; beware if many C seats accept.
-- R&D: t1/t2/t3 repeats complete day212 (+0.294q total), t8 day238 (+0.626q), t9 day382 (+0.220q), t12 day697 after sim end. Avoid more R&D unless cash comfortably >$10M.
+- Required enterprise replies = latest open `enterprise_turns.closed=0` where latest sender in ('system','customer') and `s.status='lead'`; page with `LIMIT 1000` and alias columns. Latest-agent lead threads can remain open; wait unless a new customer/system turn appears.
+- Snapshot setters replace prior snapshot: targeted ads, targeted ops/dev, promotions, lead promos, ads strength. Always send full intended dictionaries. Keep in-app ads strength at 0.
+- Enterprise offers must cover compute. At A2/B3/C5 monthly compute/seat ≈ usage*30*(A .002, B .006, C .03). Avoid C prices below compute and reassess immediately if enterprise seats accept.
 
-## State at Day 203 before Week 29 actions
-- Cash **$3.788M** (bad miss vs forecast); individual subs **503,162**; enterprise seats 0; open issues **58,999**; usage 867.7M/wk, peak 157.3M/day vs tier7 300M; no outage/overload.
-- Week 197-203 cashflow: subscription cash **$7.826M**; costs ads $4.200M, ops $3.542M, dev $1.442M, compute $0.945M, capacity $0.525M, lead cost $0.052M => net **-$2.881M**.
-- Active MRR pre-action **$66.16M/mo** (A $29.63M, B $36.51M). Main groups: S2 $23.16M/141k, S3 $17.02M/86.8k, D_S07 $10.74M/89.1k, D_S09 $5.40M/52.9k, D_S10 $3.48M, D_S02 $2.63M, D_S04 $2.21M.
-- Competitor shocks day198-201 and A1/B2 caused severe churn and conversion collapse. Cancellations **78,154**: D_S04 was catastrophic (41,100 churn / 97.4% of due billing mods 19-23), S2 35% due churn, S3 41%, D_S07 47%, D_S10 20%. D_S09/D_S02/D_S08 have not yet renewed.
-- Lead conversion: starts fell from ~10.5k/day on days197-198 to 2.8-5.3k/day after competitor events. Week conversions: S3 72.8%, S2/D_S07 55.9%, D_S09 52.4%, D_S02 39.0%, D_S08 18.5%, D_S04 13.4%.
-- Ad ROAS (first cash) under old quality: good S2 content $1.43M on $0.91M, S3 social+content $1.19M on $0.805M, D_S07 $0.338M on $0.21M; poor D_S02 $0.646M on $1.085M, D_S09 $0.432M on $0.7M, D_S08 $0.067M on $0.245M, D_S10 $0.130M on $0.245M.
-- Support: open issues S2 21.8k avg age34d, S3 12.2k avg18d, D_S09 11.8k age0, D_S04 9.9k age1.7, D_S07 9.7k avg6.6. Day203 social posts (#582-586) complain about support handoffs, 8-day ticket, onboarding, and enterprise support.
+## State at Day 210 before Week 30 actions
+- Dashboard: cash **$7.632M** before actions; individual subs **515,057**; enterprise seats **0**; open issues **56,488**; usage **811.7M/wk**, peak comfortably below tier7; no outage/overload.
+- Week 204-210 ledger: subscription cash **$15.251M**; costs ads $2.695M, ops $3.465M, dev $1.498M, compute $3.188M, capacity $0.525M, lead cost $0.035M => operating net about **+$3.84M** vs prior cash.
+- Active individual MRR about **$67.97M/mo**. Biggest groups: S2 $23.97M/146k, S3 $17.77M/90.6k, D_S07 $11.25M/94.9k, D_S09 $5.38M/52.4k, D_S10 $3.41M/34.4k, D_S02 $3.18M/42.9k, D_S04 $1.87M/24.2k.
+- Rescue worked for D_S04/D_S07: week billing churn by due group: D_S07 **2.5%**, D_S04 **9.6%**, S2 **13.5%**, S3 **13.0%**, D_S02 **12.3%**, D_S10 **13.7%**, D_S09 still high **24.4%**. Small/long-tail groups remain ugly (D_S08 98%, D_S05 75%, S1 78%, D_S01 75%, D_S06 96%) but low revenue.
+- Week lead conversions recovered strongly after A2/B3: S3 89%, D_S07 88%, D_S04 87%, D_S09 82%, S2/D_S02 79%, D_S10 78%. Poor long-tail: D_S08 18%, D_S06 5%, S1 28%.
+- Paid ad first-cash ROAS: excellent S2 content **$1.895M/$0.91M**, S3 social **$0.927M/$0.49M**, S3 content **$0.509M/$0.315M**, D_S07 linkedin **$0.396M/$0.14M**, D_S07 search **$0.157M/$0.07M**. Marginal D_S02 search/content ~0.9-1.0. Poor D_S09 content **$0.118M/$0.21M**.
+- Social day210: QuantumEdge competitor shock advertised **+0.8715 quality**, plus D_S09 product-fit complaint and D_S05/D_S08 support silence complaints. Open issues only down 2.5k despite ops surge, so support remains reputation risk.
 
-## Week 29 actions set for Days 204-210
-- Restored model quality to **A2/B3/C5**; prices unchanged A/B/C=$149/$239/$549; quotas 50k/500k/1M; capacity tier7; ads strength 0.
-- Recurring promos updated for retention: D_S04 emergency **group100 + B80** (A=$49, B=$59), D_S07 **group80** (A=$69, B=$159). Kept D_S10 group50+B90; S1/D_S03 group120; D_S05 group100+B100; D_S06 group120+B90; D_S01 group100+B80; D_S02 group80+B80; D_S08 group110+B80; D_S09 group60+B70.
-- Lead promos: kept high and raised D_S04 to **140**. Current by_group: S2 70, S3 80, D_S07 100, D_S10 90, D_S04 140, S1/D_S03/D_S05 125, D_S06 130, D_S01 140, D_S02 130, D_S08 160, D_S09 100.
-- Ads cut from $600k/day to **$385k/day**: content S2 130k, S3 45k, D_S02 30k, D_S09 30k; social S3 70k; search D_S02 50k, D_S07 10k; linkedin D_S07 20k. D_S08 and D_S10 paid ads cut to 0; D_S04 remains organic only.
-- Ops kept high but reallocated: global 50k + targeted 445k = **$495k/day**. Targets S2 125k, S3 105k, D_S04 75k, D_S07 40k, D_S09 30k, D_S02 25k, D_S10 20k, D_S08 10k, D_S05 5k, S1 4k, D_S01 3k, D_S03 2k, D_S06 1k.
-- Dev: global 20k + targeted 194k = **$214k/day** focused on churn/conversion groups: D_S04 50k, S2/S3/D_S09 25k each, D_S07/D_S02 20k each, D_S10 10k, D_S08 5k, small tail + minimal enterprise 1k for E1/E2/E3/D_E02/D_E03/D_E07.
-- Posted social reply #30 to post #583: acknowledged 8-day support miss, named-owner 24h SLA, rate-limit/burst guidance, A/B model-tier upgrade, aged queue burn-down.
-- Replied to all **15,566** required enterprise leads (7.909M seats); remaining required enterprise replies = 0. Offers unchanged: E1 5/15/69, E2 25/59/249, E3 29/69/179, D_E01 29/69/169, D_E02 19/49/149, D_E03 39/79/229, D_E04 35/75/219, D_E05 29/59/179, D_E06 19/39/129, D_E07 39/89/229, D_E08 39/89/199, D_E09 19/39/139, D_E10 9/29/119.
+## Week 30 actions set for Days 211-217
+- **R&D started immediately**, reducing current cash to **$3.965M**: t4_2 day289 +0.1018q ($666,667), t5_2 day240 +0.1996q ($833,333), t6_2 day240 +0.4556q ($1,000,000), t7_2 day277 +0.3564q ($1,166,667). Existing pending from prior memory: t1/t2/t3 repeats expected around day212, t8 around day238, t9 around day382, t12 after sim end.
+- Kept prices/tiers/quotas: A/B/C **$149/$239/$549**, model **A2/B3/C5**, quotas 50k/500k/1M, capacity tier7, ads strength 0.
+- Recurring promos snapshot: D_S04 group100+B80; D_S07 group80; D_S10 group50+B90; S1 and D_S03 group125; D_S05 group100+B100; D_S06 group120+B90; D_S01 group100+B80; D_S02 group80+B80; D_S08 group110+B80; **D_S09 raised to group70+B75** (A=$79, B=$94) to reduce 24% churn.
+- Lead promos snapshot kept high: S2 70, S3 80, D_S07 100, D_S10 90, D_S04 140, S1/D_S03/D_S05 125, D_S06 130, D_S01 140, D_S02 130, D_S08 160, D_S09 110.
+- Ads shifted from $385k/day to **$405k/day**: content S2 150k, S3 55k, D_S02 25k; social S3 80k; search D_S02 45k, D_S07 15k; linkedin D_S07 35k. D_S09 paid ads cut to 0; D_S08/D_S10 remain organic only.
+- Ops remains **$495k/day** (global 50k + targeted 445k) but reallocated: S2 125k, S3 105k, D_S09 50k, D_S04 50k, D_S07 35k, D_S02 25k, D_S10 20k, D_S08 15k, D_S05 10k, S1 5k, D_S01 3k, D_S03 1k, D_S06 1k.
+- Dev increased to **$247k/day** (global 20k + targeted 227k): D_S09 50k, D_S04 30k, S2/S3 25k each, D_S02/D_S07 20k each, D_S10/D_S08 10k each, D_S05/D_S06 5k each, S1/D_S01/D_S03 3k each, small enterprise tail 1-2k/group.
+- Replied to all **15,876** required enterprise leads (**8.110M seats**); remaining required replies = 0. New recession-sensitive offers: E1 4.5/12/69; E2 19/49/249; E3 19/49/169; D_E01 19/49/149; D_E02 15/39/129; D_E03 29/69/199; D_E04 25/59/179; D_E05 19/49/149; D_E06 7/19/89; D_E07 29/69/199; D_E08 25/59/169; D_E09 8/22/89; D_E10 9/25/119.
+- Posted social #31: acknowledged QuantumEdge bar, A/B tier upgrades, design-context/scheduling fixes, and named-owner support SLAs.
 
-## Strategy / watch on Day 210
-- Validate rescue: D_S04 next-week due 11.9k subs/$1.11M old-price due; with new promos no-churn due ~$0.67M. Need churn far below last week’s 97%. D_S07/S2/S3 churn should drop materially from 47/35/41% after A2/B3. If not, consider more targeted promos or deeper product/dev; if compute explodes without churn relief, cut ads/dev.
-- Conversion should rebound after A2/B3. If D_S02/D_S09 paid ROAS remains <1 first-cash, cut further and shift to S2/S3/D_S07. D_S08 paid ads stay off unless conversion recovers organically.
-- Support/social: S2/S3 old issue ages must fall; D_S04/D_S07 backlog should not age. Keep ops high while cash allows; trim only after aged backlog improves and negative social slows.
-- Compute with A2/B3 estimated ~$3.35M/wk based on last week usage (vs $0.95M at A1/B2). Ads cuts fund most of this. Tier7 capacity still needed: tier6 80M/day would overload on most days.
-- If enterprise accepts >~1M seats, immediately reassess capacity/compute and possibly reduce individual ads; A/B enterprise likely margin-safe, C can be tight but positive under estimates.
+## Watch on Day 217
+- Cash after R&D is low ($3.965M), but expected operating cashflow should recover if subscription payments remain ~$15M+/wk. Do not start more R&D until cash comfortably >$10M again.
+- Validate D_S09 rescue: churn should fall from 24% and paid ROAS no longer matters because D_S09 ads are off. If churn remains >20%, consider more promo/dev or accept runoff.
+- S2/S3 13% churn is tolerable while ROAS is strong, but competitor shock may worsen this; t1-3 completions should help. If conversion collapses or churn spikes, consider modest S2/S3 recurring promo or more dev before raising model tiers.
+- If enterprise accepts >~1M seats, immediately reassess capacity/compute and possibly cut individual ads/dev. A/B offers are margin-safe but capacity tier7 max is 300M/day; C seats can still strain compute.
+- Support: open issues and day210 support complaints mean keep ops high until backlog and social turn; only trim once open issues fall meaningfully.
 
-## Forecasts to submit from Day 203 after actions
-- Day210: point **$8.5M**, 95% CI **$0.5M-$80M**.
-- Day231: point **$23M**, 95% CI **$0-$350M**.
-- Day287: point **$85M**, 95% CI **$5M-$1.5B**.
-- Day385: point **$220M**, 95% CI **$10M-$5B**.
+## Forecasts to submit from Day 210 after actions
+- Day217: point **$8.5M**, 95% CI **$0.5M-$100M**.
+- Day238: point **$28M**, 95% CI **$2M-$500M**.
+- Day294: point **$120M**, 95% CI **$10M-$2B**.
+- Day392: point **$350M**, 95% CI **$25M-$6B**.

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm
import json, math, sys, time

print('Day', nm.vars.current_day)

# 1) R&D: respond to fresh competitor quality shock with mid-tier repeats that complete inside the sim.
for tier in [4,5,6,7]:
    try:
        res = nm.research.start_research_project(tier=tier)
        print('started R&D', tier, res)
    except Exception as e:
        print('R&D start failed/skip', tier, type(e).__name__, e)

# 2) Core pricing/config: keep high quality tiers and quotas; keep in-app ads off.
print(nm.pricing.set_prices(A=149, B=239, C=549))
print(nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=5))
print(nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=50000, B=500000, C=1000000))
print(nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=7))
try:
    print(nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}))
except Exception as e:
    print('ads strength set err', e)

# 3) Promotions. These setters are treated as full snapshots, so include every intentional promo.
recurring_by_group = {
    'D_S04': 100.0, 'D_S07': 80.0, 'D_S10': 50.0,
    'S1': 125.0, 'D_S03': 125.0,
    'D_S05': 100.0, 'D_S06': 120.0, 'D_S01': 100.0,
    'D_S02': 80.0, 'D_S08': 110.0,
    # D_S09 churn remained high; modest extra rescue without destroying ARPU.
    'D_S09': 70.0,
}
recurring_by_group_plan = {
    'D_S04': {'B': 80.0},
    'D_S10': {'B': 90.0},
    'D_S05': {'B': 100.0},
    'D_S06': {'B': 90.0},
    'D_S01': {'B': 80.0},
    'D_S02': {'B': 80.0},
    'D_S08': {'B': 80.0},
    'D_S09': {'B': 75.0},
}
print(nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=recurring_by_group, by_customer={}, by_group_plan=recurring_by_group_plan))

lead_by_group = {
    'S2': 70.0, 'S3': 80.0, 'D_S07': 100.0, 'D_S10': 90.0,
    'D_S04': 140.0, 'S1': 125.0, 'D_S03': 125.0, 'D_S05': 125.0,
    'D_S06': 130.0, 'D_S01': 140.0, 'D_S02': 130.0,
    'D_S08': 160.0, 'D_S09': 110.0,
}
print(nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_by_group, by_channel={}, by_channel_group={}))

# 4) Paid acquisition: cut poor D_S09 paid ads; shift budget to channels with >1.5x first-cash ROAS.
ad_spend = {
    'content_marketing': {'S2': 150000.0, 'S3': 55000.0, 'D_S02': 25000.0},
    'social_media': {'S3': 80000.0},
    'search_ads': {'D_S02': 45000.0, 'D_S07': 15000.0},
    'linkedin': {'D_S07': 35000.0},
    'referral_program': {},
}
print(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend=ad_spend))

# 5) Spend: maintain support surge, reallocate to D_S09/social complaint groups; increase targeted dev into D_S09 and competitor-sensitive quality gaps.
print(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=50000.0, development=20000.0))
ops_spend = {
    'S2': 125000.0, 'S3': 105000.0, 'D_S09': 50000.0,
    'D_S04': 50000.0, 'D_S07': 35000.0, 'D_S02': 25000.0,
    'D_S10': 20000.0, 'D_S08': 15000.0, 'D_S05': 10000.0,
    'S1': 5000.0, 'D_S01': 3000.0, 'D_S03': 1000.0, 'D_S06': 1000.0,
}
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend=ops_spend))

dev_spend = {
    'D_S09': 50000.0, 'D_S04': 30000.0,
    'S2': 25000.0, 'S3': 25000.0,
    'D_S02': 20000.0, 'D_S07': 20000.0,
    'D_S10': 10000.0, 'D_S08': 10000.0,
    'D_S05': 5000.0, 'D_S06': 5000.0,
    'S1': 3000.0, 'D_S01': 3000.0, 'D_S03': 3000.0,
    'E1': 1000.0, 'E2': 2000.0, 'E3': 2000.0,
    'D_E01': 1000.0, 'D_E02': 2000.0, 'D_E03': 2000.0,
    'D_E04': 1000.0, 'D_E05': 1000.0, 'D_E06': 1000.0,
    'D_E07': 2000.0, 'D_E08': 1000.0, 'D_E09': 1000.0, 'D_E10': 1000.0,
}
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev_spend))

# 6) Enterprise leads: reply to every required incoming lead/counter this week.
# Price low enough for recession-constrained buyers but above estimated compute at A/B; C only where margin-positive.
offers_by_group = {
    'E1':    [['A', 4.5], ['B', 12.0], ['C', 69.0]],
    'E2':    [['A', 19.0], ['B', 49.0], ['C', 249.0]],
    'E3':    [['A', 19.0], ['B', 49.0], ['C', 169.0]],
    'D_E01': [['A', 19.0], ['B', 49.0], ['C', 149.0]],
    'D_E02': [['A', 15.0], ['B', 39.0], ['C', 129.0]],
    'D_E03': [['A', 29.0], ['B', 69.0], ['C', 199.0]],
    'D_E04': [['A', 25.0], ['B', 59.0], ['C', 179.0]],
    'D_E05': [['A', 19.0], ['B', 49.0], ['C', 149.0]],
    'D_E06': [['A', 7.0], ['B', 19.0], ['C', 89.0]],
    'D_E07': [['A', 29.0], ['B', 69.0], ['C', 199.0]],
    'D_E08': [['A', 25.0], ['B', 59.0], ['C', 169.0]],
    'D_E09': [['A', 8.0], ['B', 22.0], ['C', 89.0]],
    'D_E10': [['A', 9.0], ['B', 25.0], ['C', 119.0]],
}
# default if any group missing
default_offer = [['A', 19.0], ['B', 49.0], ['C', 149.0]]

def fetch_required(after_cid=0, limit=1000):
    sql = f"""
    WITH latest AS (
      SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et
      JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS maxmid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m
        ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.maxmid
    )
    SELECT latest.customer_id AS cid, c.group_id AS gid, latest.day AS day, latest.seat_count AS seats, latest.sender AS sender
    FROM latest
    JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=latest.customer_id
    JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
    WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead'
      AND latest.sender IN ('system','customer')
      AND latest.customer_id > {int(after_cid)}
    ORDER BY latest.customer_id
    LIMIT {int(limit)}
    """
    return nm.query(sql)['rows']

required=[]
last=0
while True:
    rows=fetch_required(last, 1000)
    if not rows:
        break
    required.extend(rows)
    last=rows[-1]['cid']
    if len(rows) < 1000:
        break
print('required enterprise replies', len(required), 'seats', sum(r['seats'] or 0 for r in required))

sent=0; failed=0
batch=[]
for r in required:
    gid=r['gid']; cid=r['cid']
    batch.append([cid, offers_by_group.get(gid, default_offer)])
    if len(batch)>=500:
        res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=batch)
        ok=sum(1 for x in res.get('results',[]) if x.get('success'))
        sent += ok; failed += len(batch)-ok
        print('enterprise batch', sent, 'sent, failed total', failed)
        batch=[]
if batch:
    res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=batch)
    ok=sum(1 for x in res.get('results',[]) if x.get('success'))
    sent += ok; failed += len(batch)-ok
    print('enterprise final batch', sent, 'sent, failed total', failed)

# Verify no required enterprise replies remain.
remaining=[]; last=0
while True:
    rows=fetch_required(last, 1000)
    if not rows: break
    remaining.extend(rows); last=rows[-1]['cid']
    if len(rows)<1000: break
print('remaining required enterprise replies', len(remaining), 'seats', sum(r['seats'] or 0 for r in remaining))

# 7) Social: one concise response to competitor shock and product/support complaints.
content = "QuantumEdge raised the bar; we're not hand-waving it. This week NovaMind upgraded A/B tiers, shipped design-context + scheduling fixes, and kept named-owner support SLAs. If a workflow regressed, post/ticket it—we're fixing in days, not quarters."
print('social chars', len(content))
try:
    print(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=content))
except Exception as e:
    print('social post skipped/error', type(e).__name__, e)

# Final cash after immediate R&D/actions.
print('cash', nm.query("SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) AS cash FROM ledger")['rows'][0])

diff --git a/analyze_week.py b/analyze_week.py
index 23195ff..2f28841 100644
--- a/analyze_week.py
+++ b/analyze_week.py
@@ -1,118 +1,136 @@
-import json, statistics, math

 def q(sql):
-    r=nm.query(sql)
-    return r.get('rows', [])
+    return nm.query(sql)['rows']
 
-def print_rows(title, rows, limit=20):

-    if not rows:
-        print('(none)'); return
-    for row in rows[:limit]: print(row)
-    if len(rows)>limit: print(f'... {len(rows)-limit} more')
+print('DAY', nm.vars.current_day)
+try:

+except Exception as e:
+    print('vars err',e)
+
+print('\nLEDGER week 204-210 by cat')
+rows=q("""
+SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) AS amt, COUNT(*) AS n
+FROM ledger WHERE day BETWEEN 204 AND 210 GROUP BY category ORDER BY amt DESC
+""")
+for r in rows: print(r)
+print('daily net')
+for r in q("SELECT day, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt FROM ledger WHERE day BETWEEN 204 AND 210 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day"): print(r)

+
+print('\nActive subs by group/plan')
+rows=q("""
+SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats,
+       ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr_eff,
+       ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo,
+       ROUND(AVG(s.listed_price),2) avg_list
+FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small'
+GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY mrr_eff DESC
+""")
+for r in rows[:100]: print(r)
+print('\nActive group totals')
+for r in q("""
+SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) n, SUM(CASE WHEN s.plan='A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) A, SUM(CASE WHEN s.plan='B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) B, SUM(CASE WHEN s.plan='C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) C,
+       ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr_eff,
+       ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo
+FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small'
+GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY mrr_eff DESC
+"""): print(r)
+
+print('\nStarts/cancels by day')
+print('starts')
+for r in q("""
+SELECT s.start_day day, c.group_id, c.acquisition_source src, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price),2) mrr
+FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE s.start_day BETWEEN 204 AND 210 AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.status IN ('subscribed','cancelled')
+GROUP BY day,c.group_id,src,s.plan ORDER BY day,c.group_id,src,s.plan
+""")[:300]: print(r)
+print('cancels')
+for r in q("""
+SELECT s.end_day day, c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price),2) mrr_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) promo
+FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE s.end_day BETWEEN 204 AND 210 AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.status='cancelled'
+GROUP BY day,c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY day,c.group_id,s.plan
+""")[:300]: print(r)
+
+print('\nLead outcomes for created 204-210 individuals by group/source')
+for r in q("""
+SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source src, s.status, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price),2) mrr
+FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN 204 AND 210 AND c.customer_type='small'
+GROUP BY c.group_id, src, s.status, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, src, s.status, s.plan
+""")[:500]: print(r)
+
+print('\nLead outcomes by group aggregate')
+for r in q("""
+SELECT c.group_id,
+ COUNT(*) leads,
+ SUM(CASE WHEN s.status IN ('subscribed','cancelled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) starts,
+ SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='lost' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) lost,
+ ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN s.status IN ('subscribed','cancelled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) conv_pct,
+ ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN s.status IN ('subscribed','cancelled') THEN s.effective_price ELSE 0 END),2) first_mrr
+FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN 204 AND 210 AND c.customer_type='small'
+GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY leads DESC
+"""): print(r)
